name: jetson-sparktts-0p5b-nx
description: SparkTTS 0.5B controllable TTS backend for Jetson Orin NX. DEFAULT W4A16 LLM (int4 weight-only groupwise GEMM, bf16 output; edge-llm branch feat/sparktts-converged = bf16-hybrid + int4 quant plugin + shared-engine borrowed ctor; 645MB engine) autoregressively generates 32 global + T semantic bicodec tokens; speaker_decoder TRT engine computes the d_vector from the 32 global tokens in-worker (no Python round-trip); BiCodec fp16 vocoder produces 16kHz mono PCM. Streaming overlap-chunk vocoder (TTFA ~0.81-0.92s on Orin NX). Controllable voice via gender/pitch/speed style labels; voice clone via 32 global ids. Native C++ worker (spark_tts_worker) subprocess; Python backend wraps the JSON-line protocol via WorkerIO. N>1 concurrency via per-slot LLM execution context (--max_slots). Verified orin-nx 2026-06-26 (worker md5 2049182b, plugin 5f6e7c49, W4A16 engine 8b3064da): clone+controllable CER/WER=0.0000, N=2 MD5 byte-identical, 0 CUDA error. GPU footprint (cudaMemGetInfo, clean) N=1 ~360MB / N=2 ~700MB; shared-engine loads the 645MB int4 engine once (per-slot increment ~210-340MB dominated by vocoder exec contexts, not the LLM). Unified-memory budget (peak_unified_mb) N=1 ~900MB / N=2 ~1400MB incl host-side working set + margin.
